views.markdown: **AntiDarkSword** defends jailbroken devices against WebKit RCE exploits and iMessage zero-click attack chains ‚Äî including **Coruna**, **DarkSword**, and **BLASTPASS** ‚Äî at the injection layer before any payload reaches the app.

‚Ä¢ **WebKit hardening** ‚Äî hooks WKWebView, WKWebViewConfiguration, WKPreferences, and WKWebpagePreferences to cut renderer-level attack surface
‚Ä¢ **iMessage zero-click blocking** ‚Äî suppresses IMFileTransfer downloads and risky attachment preview generation (HEIC, HEIF, WebP, PDF)
‚Ä¢ **Remote content rules** ‚Äî WKContentRuleList compiled per-process; default-on for messaging and mail apps
‚Ä¢ **User Agent spoofing** ‚Äî overrides `navigator.userAgent` / `userAgentData` via WKUserScript; presets from iOS 15 ‚Üí macOS, Android, Windows
‚Ä¢ **App extension coverage** ‚Äî Share, NSE, notification content, and iMessage extensions inherit or override their parent app's rules
‚Ä¢ **Corellium VM decoy** ‚Äî fabricates a plausible stat for `/usr/libexec/corelliumd`, spoofs `kern.osversion`, and neutralises env/path probes
‚Ä¢ **Daemon protection** ‚Äî hooks `imagent`, `identityservicesd`, `apsd`, and `IMDPersistenceAgent` at Level 3
‚Ä¢ **TrollFools variant** ‚Äî substrate-free build; injected per-app, no jailbreak required

‚Ä¢ **Level 1** ‚Äî browsers, mail, messaging, WebKit-heavy apps
‚Ä¢ **Level 2** ‚Äî Level 1 + social and media apps
‚Ä¢ **Level 3** ‚Äî Level 2 + system daemons (iMessage services)

Custom per-app and per-extension rules override the active level for any bundle ID.

**iOS 13 ‚Äì 17**

‚Ä¢ `iphoneos-arm64` rootless ‚Äî Dopamine 2, RootHide, palera1n rootless
‚Ä¢ `iphoneos-arm` rootful ‚Äî palera1n rootful
‚Ä¢ `iphoneos-arm` legacy ‚Äî Checkra1n, unc0ver, Electra (iOS 13‚Äì14)
‚Ä¢ TrollFools dylib ‚Äî no jailbreak required (iOS 15+)
